title: Zotero 9-only core: manifest + direct mergeItems
goal: Make plugin Zotero 9 only: update manifest compatibility source to strict_min/max 9.0/9.* and rely on zotero-plugin-scaffold to generate update.json/update-beta.json from the built manifest; switch merger.ts to direct ChromeUtils.importESModule mergeItems; delete dead patchMergePDFAttachments. No version branching.
in_scope: Use zotero-plugin-scaffold build flow: update.json/update-beta.json are generated from build/addon/manifest.json and copied to repo root by zotero-plugin.config.ts build:makeUpdateJSON hook
Remove legacy dependency on scripts/build.mjs and scripts/update-template.json for update manifest generation
merger.ts uses ChromeUtils.importESModule for mergeItems directly (no Zotero.Items.merge fallback)
Add ChromeUtils stub to test setup
Add tests for mergeItems call path and JSON prefill logic
out_of_scope: Customizing or extending mergeItems behavior (Zotero 9 features like annotation preservation come for free via direct call)
acceptance: addon/manifest.json has strict_min_version 9.0 AND strict_max_version 9.*; npm run build generates build/update.json, build/update-beta.json, root update.json, and root update-beta.json with the same Zotero compatibility bounds
scripts/update-template.json and scripts/build.mjs are not referenced by active package scripts or build configuration
merger.ts calls mergeItems via ChromeUtils.importESModule directly
No isZotero9OrLater or version.ts in codebase
MANUAL: Plugin installs and merges work in Zotero 9
